title: Enchanted Banana
description: A client modpack that improves the performance and quality of the game
body:
A client modpack that improves the performance and visual quality of the game.

Primarily, the performance is enhanced, but the visual "look and feel" is also slightly adjusted.

Only minimal changes are made here, more particles, more animations, nothing that fundamentally changes the core gameplay experience.

The main focus of this modpack is to offer an experience as close to vanilla as possible while slightly modifying Minecraft to make it look and feel a bit more interesting.

This modpack is 100% client-side and only includes mods that are allowed by most servers and are not considered cheating. (please verify beforehand)

The Ressourcepacks used are:

[Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

[Xalis Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books)
